title: Monstering the Rocketman
full_description: When the soaraway Sun newspaper falsely accuses Elton John, 39, of bonking rent boys, the Rocketman blasts off a whopping multi-million lawsuit. But fuming editor Kelvin MacKenzie is unrepentant and launches a blistering campaign of media harassment. Where is the line between fact and fiction? Not our concern. Truth is just a commodity to be sold. A probing and provocative exploration of truth, privacy and ambition based on Britain's biggest-ever libel case. Fringe First winner 2025.
ai_summary: Henry Naylor's one-man Fringe First winner retells Britain's biggest libel case — Elton John vs The Sun — through the eyes of a cub reporter in Kelvin MacKenzie's newsroom in the 1980s. A sharp, fast-moving examination of what happens when tabloid power and a celebrity's dignity collide.
